headline: Philip Morris Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Organic Sales Rise 7.6% Y/Y
summary: PM beats second-quarter estimates as adjusted EPS rose 15.2% and organic sales climbed 7.6%, while smoke-free growth supported results.

raw.headline: Philip Morris Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Organic Sales Rise 7.6% Y/Y
raw.summary: PM beats second-quarter estimates as adjusted EPS rose 15.2% and organic sales climbed 7.6%, while smoke-free growth supported results.

headline: Buy 3 Defensive Stocks to Navigate the Ongoing Market Volatility
summary: NYT, COCO and HRL stand out as defensive consumer staples picks as market volatility, inflation fears and rising oil prices weigh on stocks.
